data.title: Fivetran recognized as a Challenger in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Data Integration Tools, reflects innovation.
data.description: Fivetran, a data movement company based in Oakland, California, has recently been honored as a Challenger in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Data Integration Tools. In this market, which involves platforms that facilitate the merging of data from various origins and the execution of activities related to data access, transformation, enrichment, and distribution, Fivetran has made significant progress. This acknowledgment highlights the company's ongoing commitment to innovation in providing data integration solutions.

data.title: AI in Manufacturing market projected to grow 38.7% CAGR, $7B in 2025 to $35.8B by 2030. Report analyzes global trends & key players.
data.description: A study by BCC Research forecasts that the global market for AI in manufacturing will grow from $7 billion in 2025 to $35.8 billion by the end of 2030, showing a compound annual growth rate of 38.7%. The report analyzes the market by component, technology, application, and end-use industry, exploring factors such as technological advances, regulatory frameworks, competitive dynamics, and economic influences. It includes regional assessments and profiles major industry players while detailing market forecasts for 2025 to 2030. AI is seen as essential for enhancing efficiency, competitiveness, security, and overall economic potential in manufacturing. Factors driving market growth include production optimization, demand for IIoT and automation, shift to smart manufacturing, smarter supply chains, and predictive maintenance opportunities. Industries are increasingly adopting AI to streamline operations, monitor equipment, and enhance decision-making processes.

data.title: Fed cut rates for the third time in 2025; $100 million Bitcoin sold before announcement; retail optimism led to "buy the rumour, sell the news" scenario.
data.description: The Federal Reserve made its third consecutive 25 basis points rate cut at the end of 2025. This decision briefly heightened optimism within the retail sector for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH); however, enthusiasm waned quickly following the market shift. On-chain platform Santiment observed that although reduced rates typically bolster risk assets by boosting liquidity and devaluing the dollar, retail interest peaked ahead of the rate adjustment. This led to a classic scenario where investors "buy the rumor, sell the news," resulting in a pullback. Market volatility increased notably when a whale sold off $100 million in Bitcoin only moments before Jerome Powell's announcement. Despite these developments, the... [the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com]

data.title: eClinical Solutions introduces AI agents in elluminate ecosystem for clinical data automation; embedded in 4 key pillars.
data.description: Boston-based eClinical Solutions LLC revealed the launch of elluminate AI agents, a new feature across the elluminate ecosystem, during their ENGAGE conference. These AI agents are integrated into four main aspects of the elluminate Clinical Data Cloud®: Data Mapping, Data Review, Risk-Based Quality Management (RBQM), and Study Operations. The agents operate under governed data, explainable intelligence, and human oversight, ensuring efficiency and accuracy throughout the system.

data.title: Retail investors are optimistic about the stock market's future, with 44.6% believing stocks will rise and 30.6% expecting declines.
data.description: Retail investors in the U.S. are increasingly optimistic about the stock market's prospects, as per the latest survey by the American Association of Individual Investors. The survey shows that 44.6% of respondents expect stocks to rise in the next six months, a slight increase from the previous week and significantly higher than the long-term average of 37.5%. Bearish sentiment decreased to 30.6%, falling below the historical average of 31% for only the second time in the past 46 weeks. Neutral sentiment dropped to 24.8%, remaining below the long-term average. The bull-bear spread widened to 14 percentage points, reflecting a market tilted towards risk-on sentiment. Overall, confidence seems steady on Main Street despite uncertainties surrounding Fed policy.
